scripts.build:worker: mkdir -p dist/static && bun build src/http/web/client.ts --outfile dist/static/app.js --target browser && cp src/http/web/static/style.css dist/static/style.css
scripts.deploy:cf: bun run build:worker && bunx wrangler deploy --config deploy/cloudflare/wrangler.toml
scripts.cf:d1:migrate: bunx wrangler d1 migrations apply pagebox --remote --config deploy/cloudflare/wrangler.toml
scripts.cf:r2:create: bunx wrangler r2 bucket create pagebox-blobs
scripts.cf:dev: bun run build:worker && bunx wrangler dev --config deploy/cloudflare/wrangler.toml
